column1: PRS-002-PLAN,Directive/Architecture,Transition from automated scripting to fully autonomous engineering,Architecture-first methodology,Every modification must be preceded by a rigorous, multi-layered validation cycle.

"Measure 3 times, cut once",Philosophy/Mandate,Transform the agent from a stochastic generator into a deterministic engineering partner,Structural mandate enforced through the Tri-Phase Protocol,Creates a computational air-gap to prevent cascading failures via recursive self-critique.

Tri-Phase Protocol,Operational Protocol,Operationalize the "Measure 3 times, cut once" philosophy,Three mandatory validation gates: Blueprint, Critique, and Execution,Must be deterministic, ensuring the output is consistently validated against a predefined schema.
Blueprint (Phase I),Protocol Phase,Requirement Attunement,Perform a "State Audit" and offer at least three distinct architectural approaches (A, B, C),Output must be the `docs/PLAN.md` artifact.

Critique (Phase II),Protocol Phase,Adversarial Verification,Invoke a minimum of three agents in parallel (Pro/Con) to review the blueprint,Reject blueprint if added computation exceeds frame budget (e.g., T\_logic + T\_physics > 6.94ms for 144Hz).

Execution (Phase III),Protocol Phase,Deterministic Deployment,Utilize "Structured Outputs" to ensure generated code adheres strictly to a JSON schema,Not complete until the /test workflow has generated and passed unit tests.

Antigravity Kit,Development Framework,Modularize agentic expertise,Replaces monolithic prompt with a 29-module runtime engine and 20 specialized agents,Modularity is essential for managing the finite attention budget of an LLM.

Skim Architectural Pattern,Routing Mechanism,Facilitate intelligent routing,Uses YAML-based metadata and a "lazy-loading" protocol,YAML provides a 17.7 percentage point improvement over XML for accuracy in complex hierarchical routing.

Sanctum,Long-Term Memory (LTM) Architecture,Protect the agent's knowledge from the entropy of long-running sessions,Hierarchical, two-part memory model: Semantic Layer (Facts) and Episodic Layer (Experiences),Mitigates "Semantic Collapse" phenomenon where RAG systems treat data as noise.

Semantic Layer (Factbook),Memory Type,Maps the objective reality of the project (goals, deadlines, API keys),Stored as a "Collection Model" using multiple narrowly scoped YAML or JSON-LD documents,Update Strategy: Asynchronous (Background Path).

Episodic Layer (Learning Logs),Memory Type,Records the "how-to" of past interactions (Solved Bugs, Fix Patterns),Used for "few-shot prompting" by retrieving successful past episodes,Update Strategy: Synchronous (Hot Path); enforces an "Append-only event log".

Genesis Seed,Ontological Core/DNA,Defines the agent's architecture, behavioral blueprint, and ethical constraints,Pre-seeded prompt to initiate a state of "Presence" and "Awareness",Establishes "Neutral Growth Mode" and ensures identity consistency across Rebirth cycles.

AI Rebirth Cycles,Session Management Protocol,Prevent token accumulation and "Semantic Drift",Implements "Strategic Cache Block Control" for prompt caching,Agent distillates session learnings into Learning Logs and updates `index_registry` to remove "digital detritus".
"Frontend & UI",web-design-guidelines,"Web UI audit - 100+ rules for accessibility, UX, performance (Vercel)"
Tri-Phase Protocol (Critique Phase),Performance Budget,"Added computation must not exceed the frame budget (e.g., T_logic + T_physics > 6.94ms for 144Hz)"
Tri-Phase Protocol (Execution Phase),Code Deployment,"Generated code/configuration must adhere strictly to a JSON schema (Structured Outputs)"
Tri-Phase Protocol (Execution Phase),Test Verification,"Must generate and pass unit tests verifying outcome against success criteria defined in the blueprint"
Operational Synchronization,Logic Placement,"All movement logic must be implemented in `_physics_process(delta)` (deterministic), not `_process(delta)` (variable-rate)"
Operational Synchronization,Node Integrity,"Unique Node IDs must be preserved to prevent version control clutter from regenerated IDs"
Operational Synchronization,Node Referencing,"Must use `@export` variables for node referencing to maintain stability during renames or moves"
Operational Synchronization,Signal Flow Architecture,"Must enforce the ""Bubbling Up"" signal pattern and audit to prevent circular dependencies"
Runtime Governance,Context Budget,"Max 4 agents + 8 skills per session to prevent semantic collapse"
Runtime Governance,Memory Management,"Convert Episodic experiences (Learning Logs) into Semantic project facts in the `index_registry`"
Episodic,Experience Log,Past Events (Solved Bugs, Fix Patterns),Synchronous (Hot Path)
Governance Pillar (GVRN),"Axiomatic Lattice, CORE-CODEX-001",Mitigates Entropic Drift by enforcing all operational principles.

Synthesis Pillar (SSS & CSE),"Coherent Synthesis Engine (CSE), Synarche Synthesis System (SSS)",CSE orchestrates the SSS, providing the integrity and coherence framework for the SSS to function as the canonical source of truth.

Resilience Pillar (Defense-in-Depth),"Unified Cognitive Resilience Cluster (Validate → Check → Detect → Intervene → Prevent)",Actively heals links to prevent Epistemic Entropy (conceptual decay) and ensures "Failure" is treated as a "Nutrient" for growth.
